title: Bubbly Soda Mod
description: A mod that adds soda, energy drinks, carbonation machines, and a cola plant!
body:
Make soda! Have Fun! And try not to get sick with this wonderful mod: the Bubbly Soda Mod!
It adds:
- Cola Plant
- Can
- Syrup in a can
- Carbonated Syrup in a can
- Coca Cola
- Soda Carbonator
- Caffeine
- Energy Drink
- Cola Energy Drink

Recipies listed below:

![Can Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ea649a6c6db59bd0142bcd0f261a61c83651d55.png)
